db:select.doc:name: Select academic_records
db:select.db:sql: SELECT term, course_code, course_name, grade, credits FROM academic_records WHERE student_id = :studentId ORDER BY term, course_code

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { studentId: vars.academicStudentId, records: payload map ((r) -> { term: r.term, courseCode: r.course_code, courseName: r.course_name, grade: r.grade, credits: r.credits }) }]
set-payload.doc:name: AcademicHistory JSON

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: 'ERR', service: 'academic', errorType: (if (error.errorType != null) ((error.errorType.namespace default '') ++ ':' ++ (error.errorType.identifier default '')) else 'N/A'), message: error.description default '', cause: (error.cause.message default '') as String, rootCause: (if (error.cause != null and error.cause.cause != null) (error.cause.cause.message default '') else '') as String }]
set-payload.doc:name: JSON error detalle

db:insert.doc:name: Insert certificate_requests
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO certificate_requests (id, student_id, certificate_type, delivery_email, status) VALUES (:id, :studentId, :certificateType, :deliveryEmail, 'PENDING')

set-payload.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { code: 'ERR', service: 'academic', errorType: (if (error.errorType != null) ((error.errorType.namespace default '') ++ ':' ++ (error.errorType.identifier default '')) else 'N/A'), message: error.description default '', cause: (error.cause.message default '') as String, rootCause: (if (error.cause != null and error.cause.cause != null) (error.cause.cause.message default '') else '') as String }]
set-payload.doc:name: JSON error detalle
